prompt: Add a public function `clamp` to this package that clamps an Int into an inclusive [lo, hi] range, plus tests covering below/inside/above. Everything must pass with the project's own toolchain.
grader_note: 2026-07-17: added required package files, a nonzero hidden boundary-behavior test, and a source-test assertion; an empty or unrecognized package and an untested stub previously passed moon check/test.
